name: Xiang Yu

skills.name: Resolute Will
skills.description: Gains damage immunity when Health falls below 30%. Basic Attacks deal extra damage to different units every 5s.

skills.name: Righteous Fervor
skills.description: Dashes forward and knocks back enemies. At the end of the dash, launches the enemy and deals damage.

skills.name: No Retreat
skills.description: Slows nearby enemies in range and reduces their damage output while dealing damage.Passive: Gains extra Health for every extra point of Physical Defense.

skills.name: Hegemon's Slash
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies in the target direction. Inflicts extra damage andstun on enemies close by.The lower his Health, the higher the damage.He gains invulnerability whilethe skill is being released, preventing his Health from falling below 1.

tips: Xiang Yu is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Resistance → Eye of the Phoenix → Blazing Cape → Spikemail → Longnight Guardian.
Run Fate for stats that match Xiang Yu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Righteous Fervor → No Retreat → Hegemon's Slash → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
Xiang Yu excels into Dharma, Arthur. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Kui, Lam without team peel.

Xiang Yu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Xiang Yu.

faqs.question: Is Xiang Yu good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu is Tier A Tank with 50.7% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Xiang Yu build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Resistance, Eye of the Phoenix, Blazing Cape, Spikemail, Longnight Guardian. Run Fate arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Xiang Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Kui, Lam into Xiang Yu. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Xiang Yu completes core items. Xiang Yu struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Xiang Yu counter?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu is strong into Dharma, Arthur according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Xiang Yu when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Xiang Yu good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Xiang Yu.

faqs.question: What lane should Xiang Yu play?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Tank, Fighter). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Xiang Yu?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Xiang Yu or Kaizer — which is better?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Xiang Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Xiang Yu?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Tank picks unless targeting a one-trick.
